nodes.context: Criminal organization originating in Biloxi, Mississippi, operating in the southern United States since the 1960s, involved in illegal alcohol and drug trafficking, fencing stolen goods, and violence.
Small criminal association operating in some Southern and Interior states.
Largest and richest mafia organization in the United States.

edges.evidence_quote: Inizialmente alleata con la piccola associazione criminale State Line Mob
edges.context: Dixie Mafia was initially allied with State Line Mob.

edges.evidence_quote: la Dixie Mafia trovò sostegno nella mafia italoamericana
edges.context: After the dissolution of State Line Mob, Dixie Mafia found support from the American Mafia.
